Nashville's Fence Stain Experts

Protect and beautify your property with our professional fence staining services. Serving Nashville, Franklin, and surrounding areas.

Protecting Nashville Fences for Over a Decade

Nashville Fence Stain Company started with a simple mission: to provide top-quality fence staining services to our neighbors. For over 12 years, we've been battling Nashville's unpredictable weather, from scorching summers to the occasional ice storm, ensuring fences stand the test of time.

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our fence contractor services.

How often should I stain my fence in Nashville?

In Nashville's climate, we recommend staining your fence every 2-3 years to maintain optimal protection and appearance. Exposure to sun, rain, and humidity can accelerate wear and tear.

What type of stain is best for my fence?

The best type of stain depends on the type of wood and your desired aesthetic. We offer a variety of stain options, including oil-based, water-based, and semi-transparent stains, and can help you choose the right one for your needs.

How long does the staining process take?

The duration of the staining process depends on the size and condition of your fence. A typical fence staining project takes 1-2 days to complete.

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"Nashville Fence Stain Company did an amazing job staining our fence! Our old fence was looking rough, but now it looks brand new. The color is perfect, and the crew was professional and efficient. Highly recommend!"

"We had a section of our fence damaged in a recent storm. Nashville Fence Stain Company came out quickly and repaired it seamlessly. You can't even tell there was ever any damage. Great service!"

David K. Fence Repair

"From start to finish, the team at Nashville Fence Stain Company was fantastic. They helped us choose the perfect wood fence for our property, and the installation was flawless. Our backyard feels so much more private now!"
